summary: Stopped in phase 1 before making any Cloudflare API calls or mutations. The required GCP Secret Manager entries for this round are not present in project noetl-demo-19700101 / 1014428265962. Anonymous access to https://travel.mestumre.dev/ still returns HTTP 200, so the SPA asset surface remains public until the Cloudflare Access token and allow-rule secrets are provisioned.

cloudflare_access_token_secret.name: cloudflare-access-token
cloudflare_access_token_secret.error: gcloud secrets describe cloudflare-access-token --project=noetl-demo-19700101 returned NOT_FOUND

cloudflare_access_allow_rule_secret.name: cloudflare-access-allow-rule
cloudflare_access_allow_rule_secret.evidence: Filtered secret listing for cloudflare/access names only showed figma-access-token, s3_access_key_id, and s3_secret_access_key.

required_operator_action: Create GCP secret cloudflare-access-token in project noetl-demo-19700101 with a scoped Cloudflare token that can edit Access apps/policies and read zone/DNS/audit logs.
Create GCP secret cloudflare-access-allow-rule in project noetl-demo-19700101 containing either an email domain such as @cybx.io or comma-separated explicit email addresses.
Rerun this bridge task after both secrets exist.
cleanup: No cleanup required. No Cloudflare Access application or policy was created.
verdict: AMBER. Pre-handoff secret provisioning is missing, so travel.mestumre.dev remains publicly accessible at the edge.
